raw_consumer_statement:
I made a XXXX XXXX refundable deposit back in XXXX with my American Express XXXX Due to numerous delays, I had decided to cancel my order on XXXX. Upon my cancellation, I noticed the refund never went back to my card. I made numerous attempts to reach out to American Express, they refused to help claiming the transaction is too old. The merchant claims they have issued a refund and won't help any further. I am now stuck and I am out {$100.00} I have attached my original transaction statement and cancellation confirmation for review. 

The merchant sent over some transaction ID claiming refund was issued on XXXX # XXXX
